raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/Chat/Agent: PTT lifecycle ownership now passes explicit terminal and bounded completed-agent context through the runtime boundary.
raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/DesktopAut: Reach-error card gains a debug bridge action so the actionable failure surface is verifiable in-process.
raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/FloatingCo: Agent completion presentation now follows the canonical terminal lifecycle used by PTT and chat.
Reach-error state (show/retry/dismiss) lives with the manager that owns the notification surface.
PTT reconnect and first-turn handoff logic now carries explicit ownership and recovery state.
Controller growth predates this ratchet; new pure policies are extracted and separately guarded by the hub ratchet.
Provider completion now exposes typed bounded continuation outcomes instead of inferred callback state.
Turn reducers now encode terminal provenance needed to distinguish completion, continuation, and recovery.
raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/Providers/: Ambient turns without Screen Recording now carry an honest screen-unavailable payload instead of silence; explicit current-screen chat questions attach one turn-scoped live image rather than historical metadata.
raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/AuthServic: Apple sign-in name capture now signals observers and persists the first-auth name that Apple sends only once.
raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/FloatingCo: Onboarding bar glow and the actionable reach-error card (Retry/Skip) render on the shared bar surface.
raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/Onboarding: Onboarding now adopts the async-arriving auth name instead of freezing the 'there' placeholder; deinit now cancels the local file memory import task alongside its siblings; goal/task generation prompts carry the sharpened instructions.
raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/Providers/: Already-granted permissions no longer reopen System Settings: the screen-recording and full-disk-access requests gate their Settings/drag-card opens behind the granted result.
raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/MainWindow: Fix destructive app-detail 'Open' button (uninstalled enabled non-integration apps): pure primaryAppAction helper + button gating + unit test; splitting this 3.6k-line view is out of scope for a bug fix
